name: OpenAI
description: Generate text, embeddings, images, and moderate content with OpenAI APIs
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The OpenAI API action to perform.

model.label: Model
model.description: OpenAI model to use. Used by: Chat Completion.

systemPrompt.label: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: System message for the conversation. Used by: Chat Completion.

userMessage.label: User Message
userMessage.description: User message content. Used by: Chat Completion.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0-2). Used by: Chat Completion.

maxTokens.label: Max Tokens
maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens in the response. Used by: Chat Completion.

input.label: Input
input.description: Text to embed. Used by: Create Embedding.

imagePrompt.label: Image Prompt
imagePrompt.description: Description of the image to generate. Used by: Create Image.

size.label: Image Size
size.description: Image dimensions. Used by: Create Image.

moderationInput.label: Moderation Input
moderationInput.description: Text to check for policy violations. Used by: Moderate Content.

result.description: Generated text, image URL, or moderation result
